0.name: The Fool
0.notes:
The Fool lives perfectly in the present.  With no thought for the past or future, she is innocent and open to surprises.  Her final destination is unknown.  The Fool's message is simple:  now is the time to take a leap of faith, trusting that the universe will provide for you.  This is not the time to follow anyone else's advice or to yield to society's notion of appropriate behavior.  Don't be afraid to take risks, even if they seem impractical or foolish.

This uncertain time may hold a mixture of fear and excitement, for the Fool promises only change, not safe arrival.  However, you can count on your choices bringing you new vistas and a broader horizon.  As soon as you are willing to step into the unknown, a new phase of your life will begin.  By living spontaneously and instinctively, you will find yourself in a magical universe, one filled with coincidence and synchronicity.  As Julia Sharman-Burke says about the Fool's journey, "not to begin is to deny the gods, which on an inner level means to deny all in us that is youthful, creative, and in touch with what is greater than ourselves.

Be aware, however, of the Fool's potential for carelessness and folly.  Taking risks does not mean ignoring real dangers.  This card is not an invitation to reckless behavior, but rather an opportunity to recognize risks and carry on with confidence.
0.name_th: The Fool — คนโง่เขลา
0.meaning_th: จุดเริ่มต้นใหม่ การผจญภัย ความไร้เดียงสา พลังงานบริสุทธิ์ ก้าวกระโดดแห่งศรัทธา ถึงเวลาเริ่มสิ่งใหม่ด้วยใจที่เปิดกว้างค่ะ จักรวาลกำลังเชิญให้คุณก้าวออกจากกรอบเดิม อย่ากลัวความไม่แน่นอน เพราะทุกการเดินทางยิ่งใหญ่เริ่มจากก้าวแรกเสมอค่ะ

1.name: The Magician
1.notes:
The Magician channels spiritual enery.  Through his contact with the divine he can access immense power and creativity.  He uses the symbols of each suit as tools in order to tap their elemental powers.  He directs these energies consciously, through the use of his will.  The will is a mighty force that can create and transform situations.  It is so profound that it is indeed magical.

While the Fool is spontaneous and unconcerned with the future, the Magician sees the connection between actions and their consequences.  Magic has been described as the science of hidden relationships.  The Magician's art is in understanding, anticipating, and working with these relationships.

In a reading, this card counsels you to take an active, engaged, and exploratory approach to life.  With focused attention and clear intention, your power to manifest is unlimited.
1.name_th: The Magician — นักมายากล
1.meaning_th: พลังงาน ความสามารถ เจตจำนง ทักษะครบครัน คุณมีทุกสิ่งที่ต้องการอยู่แล้วค่ะ ถึงเวลาลงมือทำ เปลี่ยนความฝันให้เป็นความจริง พลังของจักรวาลพร้อมทำงานผ่านมือคุณค่ะ

2.name: The High Priestess
2.notes:
The High Priestess stands in solitude and silence.  She guards a mysterious realm:  the hidden landscape of our deepest psyches.  Hers is the face upon the door of your inner temple.  She embodies intuition, wiscom, psychic abilities, and all unmanifest potential.  Her secrets are not readily accessible to the rational mind.  Rather, she speaks to us through dreams and flashes of insight.

Like the moon, the High Priestess has her hidden side.  Her presence in a reading suggests unseen elements, either within yourself or in the motives of others.  Her relationship with the moon calls us to remember cyclical time:  look for a transition in your life within the next month.

The High Priestess invites you to come to a place of stillness, receptivity, and self-awareness.  To experience her mystical vision, you may need to cultivate your ability to hear your intuition through meditation or dream-work.  Trust your inner oracle, for the knowledge you seek is within.
2.name_th: The High Priestess — นักบวชหญิง
2.meaning_th: ปัญญาภายใน สัญชาตญาณ ความลึกลับ รอจังหวะที่เหมาะ ฟังเสียงภายในตัวเองค่ะ คำตอบที่คุณหาอยู่นั้นซ่อนอยู่ในส่วนลึกของจิตใจคุณเอง อย่ารีบร้อนตัดสินใจค่ะ

3.name: The Empress
3.notes:
The Empress is the Earth Mother, who creates and sustains life.  Prolific and generous, she is the great provider.  She pours forth riches from her body, the fruits and grains and greens of the earth, symbols of her deep love.  She governs all things relating to motherhood:  conception, gestation, birthing, and sustaining a child or other creative endeavor.  She possesses an incredible magnetism that draws everyone to her, especially animals and children, who instinctively trust her maternal spirit.

The Empress reminds us of the magic and wonder of our own bodies, and the miracle that we, like her, have the capacity to give forth and nurture life.  Her power lies in her reverence for the physical world.  She loves nature, and delights in indulging her senses.

Her sensuality encompasses both the gentle intimacy of mothering and the fiery passions of a lover; either way, the Empress lives her life through love.  She needs to share herself to be herself.  Her generosity is so boundless that it can be overwhelming, and her unceasing proliferation can at times generate chaos.

In a reading, the Empress calls on you to love and care for yourself, body and soul.  Follow your emotions and listen to your instincts.  She also asks you to embody her qualities of nurturance, and give something of your own glory to the world.
3.name_th: The Empress — จักรพรรดินี
3.meaning_th: ความอุดมสมบูรณ์ ความรัก ธรรมชาติ ความเจริญงอกงาม พลังงานแม่ ช่วงเวลาแห่งความเจริญรุ่งเรืองกำลังมาถึงค่ะ ดูแลตัวเอง รักตัวเอง และปล่อยให้ความงามของชีวิตผลิบานค่ะ

4.name: The Emperor
4.notes:
The Emperor brings structure to the world of the Empress.  He turns her raw power into the fabric of civilization.  While she is the feminine principle -- mothering, nature, and love -- he is the male principle -- fathering, society, and ideas.  Together they rule our world.

The Emperor represents protectiveness and productivity, stewardship and enterprise, expansive ideas put into practice.  He is the force that organizes and rules, that makes decisions and lays down the law.  Culture can only flourish once basic survival needs are met.  The Emperor symbolizes the stability that comes with a peaceful and just society, on in which people are free to fulfill their creative potential.

The Emperor is totally committed to progress, and this can lead to intolerance of anything that seems to stand in the way.  In the name of his doctrine, he can become greedy, corrupt, or oppressive.  When the Emperor cuts off his feelings or tries to control nature instead of guiding it, he is on the road to becoming a tyrant.

For this reason, freethinkers may balk at the Emperor, loathing his dictates that seem to demand conformity.  They may vilify the rules and institutions that are our modern expression of his energy.  Yet "the system" also brings us roads, libraries, and other amenities that we often take for granted.  Without the Emperor, there would be no order; the world would be chaos.
In a reading, the Emperor asks you to look at your relationship with authority.  He challenges you to live by your own code of ethics and not just follow blindly the behavior society expects.  He calls for self-discipline and integrity; govern yourself and any realms over which you have power with a wise and steady hand.  Use his energy to creat something, to assert yourself, or to set some necessary boundaries.  And be sure to be honest with yourself:  are you living by the letter and not by the spirit of the law?  Are there places where you are being rigid or oppressive?  Dominion over oneself is necessary; domination over others is not.
4.name_th: The Emperor — จักรพรรดิ
4.meaning_th: อำนาจ ระเบียบ โครงสร้าง ความมั่นคง ผู้นำ ถึงเวลาวางรากฐานที่แข็งแกร่งค่ะ ตัดสินใจด้วยหัวไม่ใช่แค่หัวใจ และสร้างระเบียบในชีวิตของคุณค่ะ

5.name: The Hierophant
5.notes:
The Hierophant fosters the spiritual growth of his people, just as the Emperor governs their secular lives.  He teaches us about the sacred forces that lie behind everyday reality.  His life revolves around one of the greatest questions of humankind:  how are we related to the divine?

Having dedicated his life to studying spiritual traditions, the Hierophant is a strong link to the collected genius of our ancestors.  While the High Priestess symbolizes the profound mystery at the heart of all religions, the Hierophant symbolizes their specific teachings.  He offers both the best and the worst ideas of the past; it's up to you to decide which ones are useful to you.

As leaders throughout history have demonstrated, the Hierophant can get too attached to a particular dogma, and even be corrupted by his authority.  Like the Emperor, he can become rigid and intolerant, demanding conformity and blind adherence.  He may forget that each person must ultimately find the sacred in their own way.  The wisdom of the ages is only useful if it can be adapted to the present.

When the Hierophant appears in a reading, it's time to take stock of your spiritual beliefs.  Looking to different teachings and traditions can help point the way.  But ultimately, the Hierophant challenges you to comprehend your relationship with the sacred at a very personal level, and follow a path that is truly your own.
5.name_th: The Hierophant — นักบวชชาย
5.meaning_th: ประเพณี ความเชื่อ การศึกษา ที่ปรึกษา หันหาภูมิปัญญาดั้งเดิมหรือขอคำแนะนำจากผู้ที่เชี่ยวชาญค่ะ บางครั้งเส้นทางที่ถูกต้องคือเส้นทางที่ผู้อื่นพิสูจน์แล้วค่ะ

6.name: The Lovers
6.notes:
The Lovers card celebrates union.  It encompasses all aspects of romance, from the first stirrings of desire through the promise of long-term commitment.  The Lovers have much to teach us about harmony with others and within ourselves.

Every relationship is a mirror into our own souls.  Through intimacy with another, we come to understand ourselves, and are offered the possibility of emotional growth.  The cohoices you make in relationships ultimately reflect your own sense of self-worth and show the kind of person you'd like to be.

When this card appears, be prepared for a new love in your life or be ready to work on a current relationship.  The Lovers beckons you to be deliberate in your choices.  The challenge is to learn how to give yourself without losing yourself.  Trust in love, and don't let fear keep you from commitment if it feels right.
6.name_th: The Lovers — คู่รัก
6.meaning_th: ความรัก ความสัมพันธ์ การเลือก ความสามัคคี หัวใจกำลังบอกทิศทางค่ะ ไม่ว่าจะเป็นเรื่องความรักหรือการตัดสินใจครั้งสำคัญ จงเลือกจากใจที่แท้จริงค่ะ

7.name: The Chariot
7.notes:
The Chariot shows an aristocrat in all his worldly splendor.  Yet this card is governed by Cancer, a deeply internal sign, and it is actually about a journey of personal growth.  Above all else it exemplifies the challenge of self-mastery.

The charioteer steers his team with intense confidence and determination.  Just as he can be pulled by his animals in different directions, we are all at times pulled emotionally by conflicting forces.  But by bringing his diverse impulses into line, he is able to get the team to take him wherever he decides to go.

The Chariot challenges you to balance your outer and inner realities and maintain equilibrium, even at top speed.  You will need focus and concentration, for you might have to make decisions on the spur of the moment.  It may take all your resources of strength and will but, if you can keep a steady course, the Chariot will surely carry you to victory.
7.meaning_th: ชัยชนะ ความมุ่งมั่น การควบคุม พลังใจ คุณมีพลังที่จะเอาชนะทุกอุปสรรคค่ะ รวบรวมพลังใจ โฟกัสที่เป้าหมาย และมุ่งหน้าไปอย่างไม่หยุดยั้งค่ะ

8.name: Strength
8.notes:
Strength is calm and firm, but not aggressive.  This is a woman at ease with herself and the world.  The lion symbolizes her instincts and passions.  She has learned to live in harmony with her wild nature, to harness without stifling her instinctual powers.  She knows that the source of her strength is love, and so she stays open and connected to it.

Clearly, Strength is about far more than physical force; it is an emblem of inner fortitude.  When it appears, it encourages you to tap into the deep sources of strength within yourself.  You may find the courage to take risks, face your fears, begin a daunting project, or persevere in a difficult situation.  The card also asks you to look at the balance in your life between subduing your passions and expressing them.  And remember the quiet voice reminding you that great strength can be found in small things.
8.name_th: Strength — ความแข็งแกร่ง
8.meaning_th: ความอดทน ความกล้า ความเมตตา ชนะด้วยใจ ไม่ใช่กำลัง พลังที่แท้จริงมาจากข้างในค่ะ ไม่ต้องบังคับหรือกดขี่ แต่จงใช้ความรักและความเมตตานำทางค่ะ

9.name: The Hermit
9.notes:
The Hermit seeks true understanding.  Alone, she wanders through her inner landscape, listening for the voice of God.  The search demands her full attention, so she turns away from ordinary things.  Her insights come through dreams and visions.  Over time, she has gained wisdom, maturity, and self-reliance.

When this card appears, its message is clear:  make room in your life for spiritual matters.  Take time alone to reflect and look within.

The Hermit holds up her lantern of truth not just for herself, but for all seekers.  She may be someone you can look to for guidance.  But whether she symbolizes a wise teacher or your own intuition, she urges patience as you walk down your chosen path.

Stay open as you walk with the Hermit, for one day you may be called to fill her shoes and be a guiding light to others.
9.meaning_th: ความสงบ การไตร่ตรอง ปัญญา โดดเดี่ยวเพื่อค้นหาตัวเอง ถึงเวลาถอยออกมาค่ะ สงบใจ ทบทวนตัวเอง คำตอบที่หาอยู่จะพบได้ในความเงียบค่ะ

10.name: Wheel of Fortune
10.notes:
Everything on earth moves in cycles of life, death, and rebirth.  We know the planet will turn, the seasons shift.  We know people will die and people will be born.  In this world of mystery, the only promise is change.

When the Wheel of Fortune appears it foretells a major change in circumstance, often brought on by forces outside ourselves.  Although usually for the good, it will spin you off in a new direction, and the course of your life will be forever shifted.

Even if it seems like things are taking a turn for the worse, try to stay open.  Though we often cling desperately to the familiar, the challenges presented by misfortune can be formative and meaningful.  There's no telling where this bend in the road might lead, for what is happening now is bound up with your destiny.

In the midst of all the ups and downs, remember that the Wheel has a still center.  This same calm can be found at the core of your own being.  To know that place, to embrace the present and accept each moment as it comes, is the greatest gift this card has to offer.
10.name_th: Wheel of Fortune — วงล้อแห่งโชคชะตา
10.meaning_th: การเปลี่ยนแปลง วัฏจักร โชคดี จังหวะ วงล้อกำลังหมุนค่ะ โชคดีกำลังเข้ามาหาคุณ จงเปิดรับโอกาสใหม่ที่กำลังมาถึงค่ะ

11.name: Justice
11.notes:
Justice sees all sides of a situation clearly.  She cuts quickly through any pretense or untruth.  Under her stern judgment, we must take responsibility for our actions.  When she appears, she asks you to assess your life:  to sit down in council with the many voices inside yourself and offer each a fair hearing.  Only with awareness of the different forces within can you make decisions that hold integrity.

Justice counsels you to not only be honest with yourself, but also with others.  In Wiccan lore, whatever you do comes back to you threefold.  This counts for helpful deeds as well as hurtful ones, and even ill-wishing.  In Christianity, this idea is suggested by the Golden Rule, and in Buddhism it is called the Law of Karma.  Lady Justice embodies these principles, and it may now be time to reckon with the consequences of past actions.  Or she may be reminding you to be fair in your dealings with others, promising that your kindness will come back to you in turn.
11.name_th: Justice — ความยุติธรรม
11.meaning_th: ความยุติธรรม สมดุล กฎหมาย ความซื่อสัตย์ ทุกสิ่งจะได้รับความยุติธรรมในที่สุดค่ะ ทำในสิ่งที่ถูกต้อง และจักรวาลจะตอบแทนค่ะ

12.name: The Hanged Man
12.notes:
Suspended between the worlds, the Hanged Man links heaven and earth.  He is a visionary, a shaman, a mystic.  His connection with the ethereal realm imbues him with psychic powers.

When the Hanged Man appears, some element of your life is on hold.  You may feel vulnerable and be questioning things you've always taken for granted.  Your world may even feel like it's been turned upside down.  But have faith.  Allow yourself to be in suspense for a while; let go of having every answer.  It may not make any sense to you right now, but a reversal of ideas could be exactly what's needed.

The Hanged Man often asks for a sacrifice in exchange for his wisdom.  Feelings of being stuck or trapped persist only as long as you cling to your usual perspective.  If you are willing to give up some belief or attitude that no longer serves you, your reward will be well worth it.  You will gain a deeper understanding of your life and, with this new perspective, old dilemmas and chronic problems can be resolved.
12.name_th: The Hanged Man — ชายถูกแขวน
12.meaning_th: การยอมรับ มุมมองใหม่ การรอคอย การปล่อยวาง หยุดดิ้น มองปัญหาจากมุมใหม่ค่ะ บางครั้งการยอมแพ้ชั่วคราวคือทางออกที่ดีที่สุดค่ะ

13.name: Death
13.notes:
While pulling the Death card may be daunting at first, take heart; this card is rarely about someone actually dying!  Death is in every moment of our lives; parts of us are always dying and parts are always being born.  The cycle of life, death, and rebirth is the most ancient law of the land, and each phase is necessary for the next.  Despite the many negative associations with this card, it brings you an amazing gift:  the possibility of transformation.

Now is the time to release patterns beliefs that no longer serve you.  Giving up old habits is often painful, as is the in-between state when we feel only loss without the reward of new growth.  But if you can truly let go, you can free up your energies to enjoy the wonders of this life while they last.  So don't let discomfort dissuade you from making radical changes.  Have trust in the future, bid farewell to the past, and allow yourself to be reborn.
13.meaning_th: การเปลี่ยนแปลงครั้งใหญ่ การสิ้นสุด การเริ่มต้นใหม่ การเปลี่ยนแปลง ไพ่นี้ไม่ได้หมายถึงความตายค่ะ แต่หมายถึงบทเก่ากำลังจบลงเพื่อเปิดทางให้บทใหม่ที่ดีกว่าค่ะ

14.name: Temperance
14.notes:
With grace and precision, Temperance blends the different elements of his life into a work of art.  The resulting harmony shines from deep in his being.  He teaches us to balance opposites, and urges moderation in all things.  By integrating our inner and outer realities, the beauty of our  own unique selves can emerge.  

Everything done by the angel is well thought out and deliberate.  He cautions you to think before you act, examining the situation carefully before making a commitment or a decision.  The best course of action may be to take no action, at least for now.

Temperance often brings the message of a need for physical or spiritual healing.  Creative self-expression through art may be just the right medicine!
14.name_th: Temperance — ความพอดี
14.meaning_th: สมดุล ความอดทน การผสมผสาน ความพอดี จงหาจุดสมดุลในทุกด้านของชีวิตค่ะ ไม่มากไม่น้อยเกินไป ความพอดีคือกุญแจสู่ความสุขที่แท้จริงค่ะ

15.name: The Devil
15.notes:
The Devil reminds us of our base natures.  Through him we come face to face with our dark side.  He embodies all of our shadowy elements, especially our addictions and obsessions.  At his worst he is relentless in driving us to do things that undermine the spirit and prey upon the body.  Through our feelings of fear and inadequacy, he discovers and exploits our weaknesses.  He challenges us to look at the parts of ourselves that we have repressed or denied, including desires we are afraid to voice.

One of the things people commonly both fear and desire is sex.  Our culture teaches us to hide and be ashamed of our sexuality, which can lead to a whole range of unhealthy attitudes and behaviors.  As his symbol, the inverted pentagram, suggests, the Devil exalts the flesh over the spirit.  His appearance bids you to consider your attitude toward your sexual desires.  Seek the road between inhibition and compulsion.  Seek pleasure without shame and appreciate the body as the natural partner to the soul, rather than master or slave to it.

As repulsive or frightening as he may be, the Devil brings a crucial lesson:  light and dark must coexist.  Until we confront and explore the more unsavory parts of ourselves, they will enslave us.
15.meaning_th: ความผูกพัน ความหลง ความกลัว สิ่งที่กดขี่ มีบางสิ่งกำลังยึดคุณไว้ค่ะ จงตรวจสอบว่ามีความกลัวหรือนิสัยไม่ดีอะไรที่ต้องปลดปล่อยออกไปค่ะ

16.name: The Tower
16.notes:
Bad luck, disaster, catastrophic change.  Often we refuse to let go of our self-delusion without literally having it torn away from us.  And so, one way or another, the Tower brings us release from our stagnant condition.

Fortunately, the Tower is most often only a warning that a volatile situation is about to explode.  If you haven't already learned the hard way, chances are that something major needs to shift.  Some genuine soul-searching can save a lot of anguish.  If you don't take action now, be prepared for the worst.

Sometimes the Tower's teaching comes as a flash of insight, helping us to see exactly what needs to change.  This revelation can come at any time and in any form, so be prepared for guidance from unexpected places.  And you would be wise to give up your ideas of how things should turn out, for the way down from the Tower is bound to be full of surprises.
16.meaning_th: การพังทลาย การเปลี่ยนแปลงกะทันหัน ความจริงที่เปิดเผย แม้จะดูน่ากลัว แต่สิ่งที่พังทลายคือสิ่งที่ไม่แข็งแรงพอค่ะ หลังพายุจะมีรุ้งเสมอค่ะ

17.name: The Star
17.notes:
The Star brings healing and wholeness.  Her appearance promises renewal, instilling us with hope and optimism.  She foretells calm and peace, particularly after difficulty, and the chance to begin again.

The Star fills us with inspiration and understanding.  She pours out her blessings freely, spreading compassion and kindness among people.  She knows that life can never empty her out; there is always more love to give.

If the Star graces your reading, breathe deeply and feel her healing waters flow through your life.
17.name_th: The Star — ดวงดาว
17.meaning_th: ความหวัง การฟื้นฟู แรงบันดาลใจ ความเชื่อมั่น แสงสว่างกำลังปรากฏค่ะ ช่วงเวลาแห่งการฟื้นฟูและความหวังกำลังมาถึง จงเชื่อในตัวเองค่ะ

18.name: The Moon
18.notes:
The Moon is guardian of the night soul, our subconscious minds.  She speaks to us from the other side of day in signs and symbols, some inspiring and others frightening.

The Moon's terrain is foreign and bewildering to most.  Indeed, her appearance may only portend a time of confusion, uncontrollable emotions, even madness.  But if we are prepared to leave behind familiar territory, the Moon can lead us to our deepest source of creativity.  She can help us tap into our intuitive and psychic abilities.  With night vision, we see what the daylight only obscures:  the hidden forces behind waking reality.

When the Moon comes up in a reading, peer into the shadows of your mind.  Pay attention to your dreams.  Look at your fears to see what lies behind them.  Accept the power and strangeness of your own imagination, and follow the deep currents of your mind toward the distant horizon.
18.name_th: The Moon — ดวงจันทร์
18.meaning_th: ภาพลวงตา ความลึกลับ ความกลัว สัญชาตญาณ บางสิ่งไม่ชัดเจนนักค่ะ ระวังการหลอกลวงหรือความเข้าใจผิด ฟังสัญชาตญาณมากกว่าสิ่งที่เห็นค่ะ

19.name: The Sun
19.notes:
The Sun brings us a deep yet simple joy.  It restores our sense of wonder, helping us to see the world with the innocence of a young child.  Life is good, for there is nothing to fear in the brilliant land of the Sun.

With the Sun's light comes fresh energy and renewed vitality.  Especially after a hard time, we can once again see the beauty of life and the interconnectedness of all things.

By shining, the Sun shares its happiness with others.  This card promises friendship and love.  Its message is clear:  enjoy this wonderful life.
19.name_th: The Sun — ดวงอาทิตย์
19.meaning_th: ความสุข ความสำเร็จ ชีวิตชีวา ความกระจ่างใส ช่วงเวลาแห่งความสุขและความสำเร็จกำลังมาถึงค่ะ พลังงานบวกกำลังล้อมรอบคุณ เปิดรับมันด้วยใจที่ยินดีค่ะ

20.name: Judgement
20.notes:
This card's appearance signifies that you are ripe for transformation.  You stand at the threshold of a great change.  Yet this change awaits something before it can happen -- maybe a crucial decision on your part, or the arrival of a piece of important information.  You may also need to reckon with your past before you are truly ready to move on.

Judgement calls on you to open your eyes to a whole new say of looking at life, to move into an awareness of something bigger.  You have the potential now to be reborn into a more meaningful existence.  Will you heed this call to awaken?
20.name_th: Judgement — การพิพากษา
20.meaning_th: การตื่นรู้ การเรียกสู่บทใหม่ การอภัย การฟื้นคืน เสียงแห่งจักรวาลกำลังเรียกคุณสู่ชีวิตใหม่ค่ะ ถึงเวลาอภัยตัวเองและผู้อื่น แล้วก้าวสู่บทใหม่อย่างเต็มภาคภูมิค่ะ

21.name: The World
21.notes:
The Universe dance in rapturous unity with all that is.  Her body, mind, and spirit move in harmony with each other and with the cosmos.  She is an emblem of wholeness, a fully realized human.  Her perfection is an ideal that we all spiral toward and away from.

As the last card of the Major Arcana, the Universe represents a cycle reaching completion.  When she appears, events and relationships will come full circle, and lingering issues will be resolved.

The Universe offer you her divine perfection.  She challenges you to know yourself and your place in the world.  Keep in mind, however, that the end of every cycle holds the seeds of a new beginning.  On the next step of the spiral you may play the Fool once again.
21.meaning_th: ความสมบูรณ์ ความสำเร็จ การบรรลุ วัฏจักรครบสมบูรณ์ คุณอยู่ในจุดสูงสุดของวัฏจักรนี้ค่ะ ความสำเร็จ ความสมบูรณ์ และความสุขอยู่ในมือคุณแล้วค่ะ

22.name: Ace of Wands
22.notes:
CREATIVITY
The Ace of Wands, like all the Aces, holds magnificent potential.  The card presents the best qualities of the suit of fire:  strength, power, inspiration, passion, and transformation.  A restless, adventuresome energy is percolating beneath the surface of the familiar.  This upsurge of creativity marks an auspicious time to begin new projects and take on new challenges.  Fresh vision, burgeoning hopes, and a newfound optimism can give you the courage required to invent a whole new role for yourself.  But this seed within you needs nurturing to grow to the light.  Ally yourself with this fierce power.  It will infuse you with the vigor and confidence to face obstacles and to do what once seemed impossible.
22.meaning_th: พลังงานสร้างสรรค์ใหม่ แรงบันดาลใจ จุดเริ่มต้นโครงการ ไฟแห่งความหลงใหล พลังงานใหม่กำลังลุกโชน ถึงเวลาเริ่มสิ่งที่คุณฝันไว้ค่ะ

23.name: Two of Wands
23.notes:
INITIATIVE
The Two of Wands marks the first step toward your desire.  You stand at the door to your future, contemplating the way.  Have confidence in yourself.  Do not doubt the light bulbs going off in your head.  Insight and observation, the voice of the sea and the map of the stars, will lead you every step of the way.  Dream, and push off to new and wondrous shores.
23.meaning_th: การวางแผน การมองการณ์ไกล การตัดสินใจ การรอผล คุณกำลังอยู่ที่จุดแยกทาง มองการณ์ไกลและเลือกเส้นทางที่ใช่ค่ะ

24.name: Three of Wands
24.notes:
AMBITION
The Three of Wands speaks of ambition and future vision.  Its message is, you are doing the right thing.  You have the mature perspective and high vantage point to see the big picture and make decisions that will bring you to your goals.  The foundation you have laid is a solid one.  If things are going well, they will continue to do so.

As much of a high point as it is, this card only shows the beginning of the manifestation of your ideas.  While the Three of Wands promises achievement and happy results, these auspicious possibilities depend on your ability to focus your will toward your vision.
24.meaning_th: การขยายตัว วิสัยทัศน์ โอกาสต่างประเทศ ความก้าวหน้า ขอบฟ้าใหม่กำลังเปิดออกค่ะ ระยะเวลาแห่งการขยายตัวและความก้าวหน้ากำลังมาถึงค่ะ

25.name: Four of Wands
25.notes:
CELEBRATION
This card portrays a joyful passage from one stage to the next.  Like the May Day celebration, the Four of Wands is about the gaiety that encourages growth and abundance.  The spring crops are in the ground.  A good foundation has been established; great optimism is in order.

Remember, delight has a vital place in creating lasting success.  With hard work behind and more challenges ahead, now is the time to relax and enjoy.  Take pride in all that you've accomplished.  You've come a long way!
25.meaning_th: การเฉลิมฉลอง ความมั่นคง บ้าน ชุมชน ช่วงเวลาแห่งความสุขและการเฉลิมฉลองค่ะ สิ่งที่ทำมาอย่างหนักกำลังให้ผลค่ะ

26.name: Five of Wands
26.notes:
CONFLICT
This card shows a conflict with another.  This dispute can range from a friendly debate to an explosive argument.  The Five of Wands asks you not to run from confrontation, but to see what insights it might offer.  As hard as it is, conflict often brings surprising gifts.  Disagreements can help you see where to look deeper in a situation.  Being challenged by another can give you a chance to get clear on what you believe and sharpen your ability to articulate your ideas.  And by standing up for yourself, yhou build self-confidence.

If you find yourself fighting another, see if you can find the source of the trouble.  It could just be a misunderstanding that has led to this fiery struggle.  Then again, a genuine conflict of interest may be at the root of it.  Either way, maintain a sense of fair play; there's no need for things to get ugly.  If you let your anger get the better of you, the chance of someone getting hurt increases.  Lashing out may be gratifying in the moment, but real violance and an enduring loss of trust may result.  The repercussions could last for a long time.

Be confident yet playful in the face of opposition.  Just don't get too cocky; compromise may be necessary.  Don't worry -- given the dynamic nature of the wands, your creativity is sure to surge and burn away the source of tension.
26.meaning_th: ความขัดแย้ง การแข่งขัน ความไม่เห็นด้วย พลังงานวุ่นวาย มีความขัดแย้งรอบตัวค่ะ แต่ถ้าจัดการได้ดี มันจะเป็นแรงผลักดันสู่ความสำเร็จค่ะ

27.name: Six of Wands
27.notes:
GLORY
The Six of Wands may herald the arrival of good news; it may also mark a moment of personal glory.  One of the most gratifying cards in the deck, it shows the high point of a creative journey.  Self-confidence forged the path to this victory, for, as Rachel Pollack says, "Optimism produces the very success it desires and expects."

Having manifested your goals, your achievements are now honored by others.  A promotion or other reward may even be granted to you.  You deserve this acknowledgement, for your success benefits the whole community.  Inspiring others with your triumph, people may begin to look to you for leadership.  However, be wary of the human desire for heroes; don't use your position to gain unfair advantage over others.  Enjoy your time in the limelight for what it's worth, knowing that fame may fade but your accomplishments will endure.
27.meaning_th: ชัยชนะ การยอมรับ ความสำเร็จสาธารณะ ความภาคภูมิใจ ชัยชนะอยู่ตรงหน้าค่ะ ความพยายามของคุณกำลังได้รับการยอมรับค่ะ

28.name: Seven of Wands
28.notes:
COURAGE
There's something that makes your blood run hot, something you are passionate about.  The Seven of Wands challenges you to gather up your courage and speak out for it.  The odds may be stacked against you, but be strong.  You know what is right.  Hold to your truth no matter who or what tries to sway you.

Be brave but not foolish.  Know the risks and recognize your limitations.  There are times when deciding to retreat is not cowardice, but good strategy.  Just be sure you really understand what you are fighting for.  This inner conviction will be your greatest strength.
28.meaning_th: การป้องกัน ความมุ่งมั่น การยืนหยัด ต่อต้านความกดดัน ยืนหยัดในสิ่งที่เชื่อค่ะ แม้จะมีแรงต้าน คุณมีพลังพอที่จะชนะค่ะ

29.name: Eight of Wands
29.notes:
OPPORTUNITIES
New energies are coming in and sparking rapid growth.  Pathways are opening, speeding progress toward your goals.  Opportunity may arrive at your door in the form of a letter, phone call, or surprise visitor.  Under these exciting new influences, creativity and inspiration can flourish.  This sudden burst of activity can be refreshing after a period of delay or stagnation.

With all this potential in the air, now is a good time to take risks and initiate activities.  As everything moves fast with this card, be prepared.  You may need to respond with mercurial swiftness.
29.meaning_th: ความรวดเร็ว ข่าวสาร การเดินทาง พลังงานเร็ว สิ่งต่างๆ กำลังเคลื่อนที่เร็วมากค่ะ เตรียมรับข่าวดีหรือการเปลี่ยนแปลงที่รวดเร็วค่ะ

30.name: Nine of Wands
30.notes:
DEFENSIVENESS
The Nine of Wands warns against being constantly on "red alert."  Ask yourself how much defensiveness is enough in this situation.  How much is just paranoia, an over-reaction based on hard knocks of the past?  If a challenge does arise, you will be in a better position to meet it than you may think.  Dedication, discipline, and persistence have prepared you for whatever comes your way, so don't get so geared up for trouble that you sit around waiting for it.  If all your energy goes into protecting what you have, nothing real has been gained.
30.meaning_th: ความอดทน ความระวัง ความแข็งแกร่ง เกือบถึงแล้ว อย่าท้อแท้ค่ะ คุณผ่านมามากแล้ว ก้าวสุดท้ายแห่งความสำเร็จอยู่ตรงหน้าค่ะ

31.name: Ten of Wands
31.notes:
BURDENS
The excitement of the wands can be seductive, compelling us to keep taking on new projects in a surge of eagerness.  But we each have our limit, and sometimes we wake one day to find that we've taken on more than we can bear.

If you are feeling overburdened, ask yourself:  What are my most important goals?  How and when can I meet them?  Are there any responsibilities that I can let go of?  You may have to admit that there are commitments you no longer have the energy to sustain.  If you don't prioritize, your excitement may turn into resentment, and you may find that you no longer have time for the things that are most important to you.
31.meaning_th: ภาระหนัก ความรับผิดชอบมากเกิน ความเหนื่อยล้า ถึงเวลาปล่อยวางบางอย่างค่ะ คุณแบกรับมากเกินไป ขอความช่วยเหลือหรือมอบหมายงานบ้างค่ะ

32.name: Page of Wands
32.notes:
The Seer of Wands embodies the restless spirit of adolescence.  Her dissatisfaction is vague and unnameable.  She's ready for a change, a new challenge.  She yearns for new vistas and unexplored territory.

Don't be surprised at her frankness; the Seer of Wands is not one to mince words!  Her hot temper and impulsiveness will get her into all kinds of trouble.  Filled with the youthful notion that she is indestructible, she can be daring to the point of danger.

This spunky girl may not be practical, but her enthusiasm is worth encouraging.  It will lead her to her true calling.  Maturity and responsibility can come later.  This Seer may represent a bold person in your life, or she may be asking you to nuture your own adventurous spirit.
32.meaning_th: ความกระตือรือร้น ข่าวสาร การเริ่มต้นใหม่ ผู้ส่งสาร พลังงานใหม่และโอกาสกำลังมาค่ะ เปิดรับข่าวสารหรือแนวคิดใหม่ๆ ค่ะ

33.name: Knight of Wands
33.notes:
When the Seeker of Wands walks into a room, heads turn.  A charmer and a flirt, he holds his audience captive with tales of action and adventure.  Don't give your heart over too quickly to him, though, for he is as unreliable as he is attractive.  This personality is constantly on the go, loving movement for its own sake.  Life is one big game to him, and tomorrow he will be galloping off again to his next conquest.  He is the first to pick up a new cause but also the first to drop it when something more exciting comes along.

Seeming to go in ten directions at once, this volatile dynamo makes a grand show but ultimately doesn't accomplish much.  With others to help ground and focus him, however, this Seeker can bring vital energy and confidence to any project.

In a reading, the Seeker of Wands may herald the need for a change of scenery.  He may also symbolize an adventurous but rash person in your life.  Or he may be pointing to tendencies within yourself to consider.
33.meaning_th: ความกล้า พลังงาน การผจญภัย การเคลื่อนไหวเร็ว พลังงานไฟกำลังลุกโชน ลงมือทำด้วยความกล้าและกระตือรือร้นค่ะ

34.name: Queen of Wands
34.notes:
The Sibyl of Wands burns the fires of the hearth.  Deeply loyal and protective of her loved ones, she radiates a warmth and constancy that can be relied upon.  She devotes herself, without holding back, to the people and projects to which she has given her heart.  Naturally generous, she wants her friends and family to have the best, and she will put all her energy into making sure they get it.

This Sibyl is a woman of great personal power and magnetism.  Full of passion and vitality, her visions burst into life.  Her strong will and sense of self-worth instill her with a certainty that her chosen course is the right one.

The Sibyl of Wands promises success, even in difficult situations.  If someone confident and intense appears in your life, the Sibyl calls on you to find these qualities within yourself as well.
34.meaning_th: ความมั่นใจ ความคิดสร้างสรรค์ ความอบอุ่น ผู้นำ คุณมีเสน่ห์และพลังงานที่ดึงดูดผู้อื่นค่ะ ใช้ความมั่นใจและความคิดสร้างสรรค์ขับเคลื่อนชีวิตค่ะ

35.name: King of Wands
35.notes:
The Sage of Wands burns with creative visions.  He loves nothing so much as a good challenge and a chance to strategize.  He is a true pioneer, able to inspire others to success.  In fact, his enthusiasm is irresistable.

Though his intentions are for the best, this powerful personality is only comfortable when he's in charge.  His hot temper can flare up quickly in the face of opposition.  Intolerant of weakness in others as well as himself, he is a notoriously bad sport.  But we rarely see this side of the Sage.  Usually we see only a charismatic leader rallying people to his cause.

The Sage of Wands may appear in your life as a dynamic and commanding person.  He may also symbolize a fiery and ambitious part of yourself or advise you to call upon your own leadership abilities.
35.meaning_th: วิสัยทัศน์ ความเป็นผู้นำ แรงบันดาลใจ ความสำเร็จ ผู้นำที่แท้จริงกำลังปรากฏ ถึงเวลาแสดงวิสัยทัศน์และนำผู้อื่นค่ะ

36.name: Ace of Cups
36.notes:
OPENING
The Ace of Cups begins the wondrous journey through the suit of water, symbolizing love, the emotions, intuition, and dreams.  The primal wellspring of the unconscious is opening up to you, offering passage through the realm of the heart.  Like all the aces, this is a card of potential.  It is up to you to shape and direct its energy.

The Ace of Cups reminds us that the law of the universe is Love.  This magical affinity holds atoms together and draws souls into harmonious relation.  This card's appearance heralds a time of great connectedness, both with others and with our own inner selves.  The door to your heart is opening, and only good things will come of it.  Like a bee spreading pollen as it travels, this journey will fertilize every facet of your life and of those around you, spreading joy, pleasure, and fulfillment.

This is an especially creative time, ideal for the conception of a great work.  The ultimate in benevolence, this card foretells a favorable outcome in every matter.  Drink from the fountain and be inspired by the beauty and harmony of the Ace of Cups.
36.meaning_th: ความรัก อารมณ์ความรู้สึกใหม่ การเริ่มต้นความสัมพันธ์ ความเมตตา หัวใจกำลังเปิดรับสิ่งใหม่ค่ะ ความรักและอารมณ์ที่ลึกซึ้งกำลังไหลเข้ามาค่ะ

37.name: Two of Cups
37.notes:
RELATION
This card shows the beginning of an important relationship or a new phase in a current one.  Love, once lost, may be found again.  A promise is made, friendship pledged, and trust begins to grow.  Courtship is a dance, a dynamic interplay of opposites.  From it a harmony of forces, both ineer and outer, emerges.  Cooperation, sympathy, and possibly romance blossom within this loving and healing union.

The Two of Cups can also indicate aspects within yourself finding peace together.  Remember that you must learn to love yourself to truly love another.
37.meaning_th: ความรัก ความสัมพันธ์ การเชื่อมโยง ความสมดุลของหัวใจ ความรักที่แท้จริงกำลังปรากฏค่ะ การเชื่อมโยงที่ลึกซึ้งกำลังเกิดขึ้นค่ะ

38.name: Three of Cups
38.notes:
FRIENDSHIP
This is the card of friendship and all that it brings:  mutual respect, enduring bonds, and social pleasures.  It speaks of loyalty and shared ideals.  Weaving together our love, we create a sacred space where trust grows, honesty flourishes, and true healing can begin.

Now is a good time to enjoy the company of a few dear friends, to have a feast, and to otherwise indulge yourself.  Connecting with feminite qualities is especially important for both men and women at this time.  You must be ready to act from the heart to build lasting relationships.  Seek out others who can reciprocate the honor and affection you are ready to share.
38.meaning_th: การเฉลิมฉลอง มิตรภาพ ชุมชน ความสุขร่วมกัน เวลาแห่งการเฉลิมฉลองกับคนที่รักค่ะ ความสุขจะทวีคูณเมื่อแบ่งปันค่ะ

39.name: Four of Cups
39.notes:
APATHY
The figure in this card has turned in on himself; he is emotionally cut off from the world.  Like him, we sometimes feel trapped within the misery of unrealistic expectations and a paralyzing lack of focus.  It's easy to wallow in discontent, allowing it to slide into self-pity, lethargy, and depression.  You may feel helpless, that nothing is worth working for, or that the world has somehow let you down.

Although a lonely time may be upon you, your isolation is ultimately self-imposed.  Life has surely held some disappointments, but don't overlook the opportunities still available.  Everything you need to turn things around is there for you.  Once you raise your head and commit to self-empowerment, the glory of life can shine through you once again.  If you get this card, it is time to start looking on the bright side.  The little mouse is trying to say, "Look around -- one cup is still full!"
39.meaning_th: ความเบื่อหน่าย การพิจารณา ความไม่พอใจ มองข้ามโอกาส บางทีคุณอาจมองข้ามโอกาสดีที่อยู่ตรงหน้าค่ะ ลองเปิดใจรับสิ่งที่จักรวาลกำลังส่งมาค่ะ

40.name: Five of Cups
40.notes:
DISAPPOINTMENT
Cherished hopes spill uselessly onto the ground.  The Five of Cups shows the moment of keen disappointment and regret we feel when we realize how much is slipping away.  You may need to admit that a relationship just isn't working, that a friendship or love affair is over.  The ties that are breaking and the hopes that are dying all belong to the past.  Let them go, for only heartache can come from hanging on.

Be gentle with yourself.  This is not a time for new undertakings.  Allow yourself to feel whatever you need to, knowing that in time you'll be able to let go of your hurts, gather up what remains, and ride on in search of wholeness.  Beyond this place lies new hope and a fresh start.
40.meaning_th: ความเสียใจ การสูญเสีย ความผิดหวัง แต่ยังมีสิ่งดีเหลืออยู่ อย่าจมอยู่กับความเจ็บปวดค่ะ ยังมีสิ่งดีๆ เหลืออยู่มากมายที่รอคุณอยู่ค่ะ

41.name: Six of Cups
41.notes:
SANCTUARY
The Six of Cups symbolizes the loving sanctuary of familiar friends and places.  In this safe haven, kindness and compassion flow freely and we can relax fully into who we really are.  We can enjoy life's simple pleasures:  sunshine on a spring day, good food, quiet time with a friend.

Just for now, leave the worries of the world behind.  Live fully in the present.  Even a few moments of such deep ease can seep into and change your life.

If you are not experiencing the joy promised in the Six of Cups, you might look to your memories for such a time.  In fact, this is traditionally the card of nostalgia, looking back on happier days.  But more than just longing for a perfect and irretrievable time, reminiscing can help you draw insight from the past to enrich the present.  Forgotten dreams may resurface with renewed potential.  Remember, the innocence and simple joys of youth are always available within.
41.meaning_th: ความทรงจำ อดีต ความบริสุทธิ์ของเด็ก ของขวัญจากอดีต ความทรงจำที่ดีกำลังปรากฏขึ้นค่ะ บทเรียนจากอดีตจะช่วยชี้ทางในปัจจุบันค่ะ

42.name: Seven of Cups
42.notes:
DAYDREAMING
The world of the imagination unfolds before the dreamer, fantasizing about many possibilities for the future.  At best, the Seven of Cups reveals our deepest hopes and fears.  Yet there is a danger in this card of getting lost in the clouds.  Unbridled fantasy can slide into self-delusion, addictive behavior, escapism, even madness.

Brining your visions down to earth requires choosing among the brimming cups.  Are you following your dreams or just dreaming?  Balancing your creative inspiration with some practicality can transform what is now only wishful thinking into reality.
42.meaning_th: ความฝัน ภาพลวงตา ทางเลือกมากมาย ความสับสน มีทางเลือกมากเกินไปค่ะ ถึงเวลาใช้สติกรองความฝันออกจากความจริงค่ะ

43.name: Eight of Cups
43.notes:
QUESTING
Sometimes we find life dragging us down.  Nothing satisfies, and feel weary to the bones.  Things may look fine on the surface but inside we are empty vessels, drained of our enthusiasm.  A bitter loss or disappointment may have brought you to this point, or maybe just a vague sense that something missing from your life.

The heart's yearning for a deeper meaning cannot be ignored.  The Eight of Cups calls you to begin a spiritual quest, to withdraw your energy from the world to be more present with your inner life.  Whether you hike up the Himalayas or retreat to your room, give yourself plenty of time alone.  Creative solitude is the single most important thing that will help replenish your joy in living.  You may also bring back greater self-awareness, spiritual insights, and possibly a whole new set of values.
43.meaning_th: การออกเดินทาง การทิ้งสิ่งที่ไม่ให้ประโยชน์ การค้นหาความหมาย ถึงเวลาปล่อยวางสิ่งที่ไม่เติมเต็มหัวใจค่ะ ออกเดินทางสู่สิ่งที่ดีกว่าค่ะ

44.name: Nine of Cups
44.notes:
WISHES
The Nine of Cups is known fondly as the "wishing card."  Now is the time to visualize your desires and intentions, for chances are good that your dreams will come true.  Financial security, health and vitality, companionship, love, and happiness are among the blessings you can ask of this card.  Fortune is smiling upon you, so make the best of the opportunity.
44.meaning_th: ความพึงพอใจ ความปรารถนาที่สมหวัง ความสุข ความฝันกำลังเป็นจริงค่ะ ช่วงเวลาแห่งความสุขและความพึงพอใจกำลังมาถึงค่ะ

45.name: Ten of Cups
45.notes:
FULFILLMENT
The Ten of Cups embodies all the love promised in the Ace of Cups.  It speaks to the deep satisfaction that comes from finding your path in life.  Having a strong sense of purpose can bring wholeness, fulfillment, and the feeling of being at home with yourself and others.

This card celebrates the joys of familial love.  It speaks to the special trust that is built over time through sharing trials and adventures.  This understanding lends a quality of security, contentment, and harmony to one's life.

In our busy world, the simple pleasures of domestic life are easy to overlook.  This card asks you to take a moment to appreciate your life, your home, and your loved ones.  Open your heart, dance with the universe, and feel the love that pours forth for you.
45.meaning_th: ความสุขในครอบครัว ความสมหวังทางอารมณ์ ความสงบสุข ความรักนิรันดร์ ความสุขที่แท้จริงอยู่ในความสัมพันธ์กับคนที่รักค่ะ

46.name: Page of Cups
46.notes:
(dedicated to Pamela Coleman Smith)
Like all the Seers, this woman possesses a youthful innocence.  She is full of beauty, yet fragile like the first buds of spring.  She is opening up, discovering self-love and with it the genuine capacity to love another.  Naturally intuitive and imaginative, her growing psychic abilities are fostered by solitude and reflection.

The Seer of Cups encourages you to spend time alone journaling, dreaming, or exploring nature.  She may describe an introspective person in your life, and almost certainly points to qualities worth nurturing within yourself right now.
46.meaning_th: ข่าวดีทางอารมณ์ ความคิดสร้างสรรค์ สัญชาตญาณ ความไร้เดียงสา ข่าวดีเกี่ยวกับความรักหรืออารมณ์กำลังมาค่ะ เปิดใจรับค่ะ

47.name: Knight of Cups
47.notes:
The Seeker of Cups worships all that is beautiful.  A dreamer and an idealist, he searches for True Love.  Yet he seems more comfortable with love from afar than with the day-to-day challenges of a real relationship.  In his quest for perfection he may abandon a good start for the allure of greener pastures.

Endowed with a rich inner life, the Seeker of Cups can be a visionary poet or artist.  He is gallant and graceful, gentle and kindhearted.  Yet he has a tendency to wander around with his head in the clouds, becoming lost and out of touch with the world.  This Seeker may be an inspired and romantic person coming into your life, or he may symbolize your own sensitive side.  When he appears, he reminds you to not only ponder your dreams but to pursue them as well.
47.meaning_th: ความโรแมนติก ความฝัน การเดินทางทางอารมณ์ อัศวินแห่งหัวใจ คนหรือโอกาสแห่งความรักกำลังเข้ามาค่ะ เปิดใจรับมันค่ะ

48.name: Queen of Cups
48.notes:
The Sibyl of Cups draws from the deepest source of love.  She has unlimited nurturance to give, and she offers her love unconditionally.  Truly sensitive to others' feelings, she offers sound guidance without judgment.  She is a natural channel for dreams, visions, and emotions -- all things of the unconscious that rise up to inform our waking reality.  She has learned to blend her imagination with action, keeping a vital connection to both her inner and outer worlds.

The Sibyl of Cups asks you to engter into your own landscape and embrace the deep and paradoxical realm of feeling.  She may come into your life as a loving and intuitive person, or she may be a part of you calling to be brought forth.
48.meaning_th: ความเมตตา สัญชาตญาณ ความเห็นอกเห็นใจ ปัญญาทางอารมณ์ ฟังสัญชาตญาณและหัวใจค่ะ ความเมตตาของคุณคือพลังที่ยิ่งใหญ่ที่สุดค่ะ

49.name: King of Cups
49.notes:
The Sage of Cups is courtly and sophisticated, well versed in culture and the arts.  He always presents a smooth exterior to the world.  But inside, he carries whirlpools of emotion.  He is uncomfortable with his own element, the watery realm of feelings.  He keeps them hidden, maybe even from himself.

This Sage is an uncommonly sympathetic person, and can be a skillful healer and counselor.  Yet he seems unable to turn and open and loving heart toward himself.  This unwillingness to be vulnerable keeps him from fully giving himself to a relationship.

The Sage of Cups may enter your life as a sensitive yet moody person.  His appearance also invites you to open up to aspects of yourself calling for expression.
49.meaning_th: ความสมดุลทางอารมณ์ ปัญญา ความเมตตา ผู้นำด้วยใจ จัดการอารมณ์ด้วยปัญญาค่ะ ความสมดุลระหว่างหัวใจและสติปัญญาคือกุญแจค่ะ

50.name: Ace of Swords
50.notes:
TRUTH
The Ace of Swords starts the often troubled journey through the suit of air.  Like all the Aces, it is a card of potential.  It offers the best qualities of its element:  inspiration, insight, and a keen intellect.

At the same time it warns of the more difficult aspects of its suit:  fear, anguish, alienation, and disconnection from the body's wisdom.  The Ace shows us the proverbial double-edged sword:  a useful tool and, at the same time, a dangerous weapon.  The question this card raises is, "How do you intend to use the mighty sword of your intellect?"  Will it cleave away outmoded beliefs, or will it defend useless dogmas?  Does it serve justice by drawing boundaries or further tyranny by suppressing creativity?

You have the gift to see the truth and logic with a beautiful clarity.  By rationally analyzing a situation, you have the ability to make good decisions.  Your heightened perception makes this an excellent time to resolve to begin a new venture.  But your mental powers can also be used to intimidate others and to undermine true perception.  The outcome depends on maintaining the integrity of your decisions.  Commit yourself to truth wherever you find it.  Lasting wisdom will result from this quest.
50.meaning_th: ความชัดเจน ความจริง การตัดสินใจ การเริ่มต้นใหม่ด้วยสติ ความจริงกำลังปรากฏชัดค่ะ ความคิดที่ชัดเจนจะพาคุณผ่านอุปสรรคได้ค่ะ

51.name: Two of Swords
51.notes:
EQUILIBRIUM
The Two of Swords shows a time of deliberate but temporary stasis.  It is a conscious choice to retreat in order to seek inner guidance.  Mental equilibrium is needed before undertaking an important decision.  This deep search can yield valuable insights into the changes at hand.

Listen closely to your intuition.  Don't over-intellectualize the situation; stay connected to your feelings.  Confidence, mental agility, peace, and composure are the gifts of this card, but be wary of procrastination.  Are you facing a decision or running away from it?  You cannot stay suspended between choices forever and will soon need to take action.  Otherwise this time of introspection may only amount to self-delusion.
51.meaning_th: ความลังเล การหลีกเลี่ยง การตัดสินใจที่ยาก สภาวะชั่วคราว ถึงเวลาตัดสินใจค่ะ การผัดวันประกันพรุ่งจะทำให้สถานการณ์ยิ่งยากขึ้นค่ะ

52.name: Three of Swords
52.notes:
SORROW
This is the card of sorrow, suffering, and heartbreak.  You may be going through a particularly painful experience, such as the end of a relationship or love affair.  Things may feel catastrophic, and it's true that nothing will be the same again.

While undeniably painful, this card holds the key to healing and growth.  Tears and woe open us up to the possibility of new beginnings.  Such grief literally creates more space in the heart.  Now is the time to look through tear-cleansed eyes at your life.  Like a river, whose course is changed by a flood, you will be a different person after this experience.  In our willingness to touch the depths of our misery, we transform.
52.meaning_th: ความเจ็บปวด การสูญเสีย ความเสียใจ แต่จะผ่านไป ความเจ็บปวดนี้เป็นชั่วคราวค่ะ หลังจากผ่านมันไปคุณจะแข็งแกร่งขึ้นมากค่ะ

53.name: Four of Swords
53.notes:
RETREAT
The Four of Swords calls for a time of withdrawal from the world.  A sanctuary in which to rest and recuperate is needed.  Unlike the Two of Swords, this retreat is not optional; it is essential.  Now is the time to heal through solitude and reflection.  Take advantage of this moment of calm to gain strength and prepare for the tasks ahead.  You may learn how to better balance your ideas with your reality.

If a choice is before you, the advice this card gives is simple:  sleep on it.  Don't make any big decisions just yet, but reflect deeply on the path that has led you to where you are.  Remember, an honest evaluation of your part in the drama is key to your growth.  Without this inner work, you may find yourself in the same kind of situation again.  At its highest potential, this card represents a vision quest, a time and place to seek wisdom.  In this fertile quietude, the pain of recent events might help you see the truth and learn from it.
53.meaning_th: การพักผ่อน การฟื้นฟู ความสงบ การสะสมพลัง ถึงเวลาพักค่ะ ร่างกายและจิตใจต้องการการฟื้นฟูก่อนจะก้าวต่อไปค่ะ

54.name: Five of Swords
54.notes:
DEFEAT
Hopes have been shattered, ambitions crushed, vulnerabilities exploited by others.  The enemy could be another individual, "the system", or your own shortcomings or lack of self-respect.  In any case, the defeat brings humiliation and a sense of helplessness.  Life may feel like a cruel joke.

These humbling circumstances are not completely grim.  Pain can be a profound catalyst for growth, and dissolution offers the opportunity for a new start.  To avoid being caught in a spiraling dynamic of bitterness and treachery, resign yourself to losing the battle.  Search for the lessons that lie in the ruins.

If you are the one who feels powerful and conquering at this time, ask yourself how you got here.  Does a trail of others' tears lie in your wake?  When people gain at the expense of others, everyone ultimately loses.
54.meaning_th: ความขัดแย้ง การพ่ายแพ้ การไม่ซื่อสัตย์ ความสูญเสีย บางครั้งการยอมแพ้คือการชนะที่ชาญฉลาดที่สุดค่ะ อย่าหลงยึดติดกับชัยชนะที่ไม่มีความหมายค่ะ

55.name: Six of Swords
55.notes:
PASSAGE
The Six of Swords is about journeys of all kinds.  This could mean taking a trip somewhere, or it could call for a change of consciousness, a passage from one level of understanding to another.  This card may also be about exploring the realms on the other side of day, through dreams or other kinds of shamanic work.

The time has come to leave old pain, places, and patterns behind.  Even if you think you're not ready, action of some kind is essential.  You know the steps you need to take to leave a difficult or dangerous situation for the tranquil shores of a more nurturing life.  Whatever path you choose, trust your inner compass to guide you.  Though the future is uncertain, the hardest part may be getting over your fear of moving into unknown territory.  A safe port could be closer than you think.
55.meaning_th: การเปลี่ยนผ่าน การเดินทาง การหนีจากความวุ่นวาย ความสงบที่กำลังมา กำลังเคลื่อนออกจากช่วงเวลาที่ยากค่ะ ข้างหน้าสงบกว่าค่ะ

56.name: Seven of Swords
56.notes:
CRAFTINESS
You've got your eye on something.  Your mind is racing, coming up with all sorts of cunning plans to get what you want into your hands.  The Seven of Swords speaks to a time when using mental strategy, wit, and tact is the best way to your goal.  In this situation diplomacy and charisma will work far better than a crowbar to open locked doors.

A stealthy plan may be exactly what's needed.  However, you may be tempted to adopt some questionable means to your ends.  If you find yourself lying or otherwise hiding your true intentions, stop and take a careful look at your motives.  Dishonesty can easily backfire.  And even if you get away with it this time, compromising your values may make the prize less sweet than you anticipated.
56.meaning_th: การหลอกลวง ความลับ กลยุทธ์ การหลบเลี่ยง ระวังการหลอกลวงรอบตัวค่ะ หรือคุณเองกำลังหลบเลี่ยงบางสิ่งที่ต้องเผชิญค่ะ

57.name: Eight of Swords
57.notes:
PARALYSIS
The Eight of Swords speaks to a time of paralyzing indecision.  You may feel so caught between choices that you are unable to move forward or back.  Although external forces may be blocking your way, the inability to act is primarily rooted in your mind.  Fear is your captor; self-criticism and self-doubt are the ties that bind you.  And there may be other emotional undercurrents at work that you haven't been willing to confront.

Despite feeling overwhelmed, it's time to shrug off your victim status and invest yourself in the outcome of your situation.  Watch out for the voice that says, "I just can't do it, I give up."  Trust yourself and start putting one foot before the other on the path to freedom.  Once you cast off your inner bonds, movement may be easier than you think.
57.meaning_th: ความรู้สึกติดกับ ข้อจำกัดในใจ กลัวเกินจริง แต่ทางออกมีอยู่ คุณไม่ได้ถูกจองจำจริงค่ะ ข้อจำกัดอยู่ในความคิดของคุณเอง ลองมองมุมใหม่ค่ะ

58.name: Nine of Swords
58.notes:
NIGHTMARES
In the Nine of Swords we confront our deepest fears.  Worry winds tendrils around your heart, tighter and tighter, until you can hardly breathe.  Terrifying visions make your mind your worst enemy.  The anxiety can keep you up at night and even make you feel like you're going crazy.

Your concerns may be for yourself or they may be for a loved one.  Either way, most of the dangers exist only within your mind.  Beneath all the apprehension, however, something may truly be wrong.  The challenge is to make out the quiet voice of your intuition from the loud voices of your fears.  Before your anxieties get the best of you, look to other cards for guidance on the best way to deal with this situation.
58.meaning_th: ความวิตกกังวล ฝันร้าย ความกลัว แต่สิ่งที่กลัวมักไม่เกิดขึ้นจริง ความกังวลที่คุณรู้สึกอยู่มักใหญ่กว่าความเป็นจริงค่ะ หายใจลึกๆ แล้วเผชิญทีละก้าวค่ะ

59.name: Ten of Swords
59.notes:
RUIN
Actual physical death is rarely described by the Ten of Swords.  More likely it marks the end of a deeply troubled situation or idea, or a multitude of problems striking all at once.  Whatever you feared most may have come to pass, leaving your life in ruins.

As painful as this destruction may be, it is absolutely necessary.  Come to terms with the reality of the situation and find the strength to see yourself through this time.  Surrender, and welcome the opportunity to end a cycle of pain and step into a better future.  The worst is over; things can only improve.  Like Osiris, you can rise again, renewed and wiser for your experience.
59.meaning_th: การสิ้นสุด ความพ่ายแพ้ แต่นี่คือจุดต่ำสุด จากนี้ขึ้นได้อย่างเดียว วัฏจักรนี้กำลังจบสิ้นค่ะ แม้จะเจ็บปวด แต่หลังจากนี้จะดีขึ้นเสมอค่ะ

60.name: Page of Swords
60.notes:
SEER OF SWORDS
Intelligent and insightful, the Seer of Swords uncovers what is hidden to others.  Still firm in her youthful ideals, she is not afraid to speak out for the truth as she sees it.  She certainly has the potential to become a gifted and persuasive speaker.  But for now, she is still learning the power of her words and how to wield them effectively.  In her impatience, she often forgets to think before she speaks.  She has yet to learn how her words and actions affect others and may be thoughtlessly hurtful.

Wrapped up in her own ideas, this Seer may seem aloof and disinterested in the feelings of others.  She tends to isolate herself from real intimacy with her harsh use of words, even though they may be true.  She needs to tailor her talent to the realm of human realities, for logic doesn't rule people, the heart does.

The Seer of Swords may represent a perceptive, impulsive, and high-spirited person in your life, or she may point to qualities to nurture or temper in yourself.
60.meaning_th: ความอยากรู้ ข่าวสาร ความคิดคมคาย ความกระตือรือร้น ข่าวหรือไอเดียใหม่กำลังมาค่ะ ใช้สติปัญญาในการรับมือกับมันค่ะ

61.name: Knight of Swords
61.notes:
SEEKER OF SWORDS
The Seeker of Swords rides in on a cold wind.  Heedless of human feelings, he cares only for his ideals.  He rushes into the unknown without fear, but also without preparation.  His ideas can create chaos, conflict, and confusion in your life.  At the same time, these ideas can widen your perspective and stimulate necessary changes.  The Seeker may convince you to abandon responsibility in order to follow a new and exciting possibility.

The Seeker of Swords may be a persuasive but reckless person in your life, or he may represent your own restlessness trying to incite change however it can.  If you choose to follow his lead, proceed with caution.  Be careful not to hurt others or to forsake things that are important to you.
61.meaning_th: ความรวดเร็ว ความตรงไปตรงมา ความมุ่งมั่น แต่ระวังความหุนหันพลันแล่น ลงมือเร็วแต่ต้องคิดให้รอบคอบก่อนค่ะ ความเร็วที่ไม่มีทิศทางจะพาหลงทางค่ะ

62.name: Queen of Swords
62.notes:
SIBYL OF SWORDS
The Sibyl of Swords files in on the winds of change, her sword ready to cut away untruths.  Her mind is clear, sharp, and penetrating.  She analyzes ideas with scientific precision.  Stern and critical, she may seem unapproachable.  She certainly cherishes her solitude, yet under all that icy reserve, she might be just a bit lonely.

The Sibyl of Swords often symbolizes someone whose life has been marked by great personal loss.  By facing pain and sorrow with courage and integrity, she has grown wise, but she can also be cynical and remote.

This Sibyl may be an intelligent and reserved person in your life.  She may also be a part of yourself with something important to tell you.
62.meaning_th: ความเป็นอิสระ ปัญญาคมคาย การสื่อสารตรงไปตรงมา ใช้ความคิดที่ชัดเจนและตรงไปตรงมาค่ะ อย่าให้อารมณ์มาบดบังสติปัญญาค่ะ

63.name: King of Swords
63.notes:
SAGE OF SWORDS
The Sage of Swords is a born statesman.  With his keen intellect and commanding personality, he maintains the social structure.  As a lawyer or diplomat, he will use cool logic as well as subtle craft and manipulation to carry out his mission.  He is a brilliant strategist, someone to look to for innovative ideas.  He is also a fair and reasonable judge, one you can count on to give impartial advice.

Just but not merciful, the Sage of Swords may seem heartless in the decisions he hands down.  He despises anything that sounds emotional, illogical, or even remotely mystical.  He can also get too wrapped up in his power, becoming rigid and controlling.

The Sage of Swords may appear in your life as a clever but overly critical person.  He may also be encouraging you to act with authority.  In either case, he cautions you not to allow your intellect to overrule your heart.
63.meaning_th: ผู้มีอำนาจ ปัญญา ความยุติธรรม ความเป็นผู้นำ ตัดสินใจด้วยหลักการและเหตุผลค่ะ ความเป็นธรรมและสติปัญญาคือพลังของคุณค่ะ

64.name: Ace of Pentacles
64.notes:
FERTILITY
The Ace of Pentacles begins the magical journey through the element of earth.  Pentacles represent the material realm:  money, possessions, home, the body, and nature.  Like the dark loam of the earth, this card represents fertile ground.  Seeds planted into it will grow into lasting achievements.

Health, wealth, and comfort can by yours, for the Ace of Pentacles offers a path for your ideas to manifest into physical reality.  Ground your ambitions into practical matters and prepare for prosperity as a vote of confidence from the universe.  If a business or work opportunity is presenting itself, it promises to be a success.

The Ace also invites you to contemplate the fundamental lesson of its suit, that what is most sacred and magical can be found within ourselves and the very objects of the earth.  You are called to see the divine in everyday life, in the pouring of tea at home as much as in the pouring of wine at the altar.  You will be rewarded not only with material abundance but also with an inner richness -- a true prosperity of the soul.
64.meaning_th: โอกาสทางการเงิน ความมั่นคง จุดเริ่มต้นทางวัตถุ ความเจริญรุ่งเรือง โอกาสใหม่ทางการเงินหรืออาชีพกำลังมาค่ะ คว้าไว้ค่ะ

65.name: Two of Pentacles
65.notes:
BALANCE
The Two of Pentacles marks the search for equilibrium during a very busy time.  You are juggling a life full of projects and commitments, trying to find the resources to support them all.  Your life is a balancing act between worldly affairs and inner challenges, responsibilities and having fun.  The juggler's trick is to maintain grace, gaiety, and adaptability in the midst of change.  She shows you how to combine outer achievements with inner growth, allowing one to feed the other.

If you can manage to keep up your present commitments, this is an excellent time to begin new projects.  Money and energy are available for these endeavors, but you will need to take a few risks and make full use of your talents.  Even if your hands are full, you have the opportunity to learn to see the sacredness in daily tasks, and develop spiritually through work and play.
65.meaning_th: การจัดสมดุล การปรับตัว ความยืดหยุ่น จัดการหลายสิ่งพร้อมกัน ถึงเวลาจัดระเบียบชีวิตค่ะ บาลานซ์ทุกด้านให้ดีค่ะ

66.name: Three of Pentacles
66.notes:
REWARD
The Three of Pentacles is the traditional card of craftspeople and other artisans.  It shows someone doing what they love well enough to be supported by it.  In the most general sense this card points to success in business.  You are ready to take on work that honors your ideals, that creates a product both useful and beautiful, and that earns you respect and recognition in your community.

Even more important than the end result, however, the Three of Pentacles speaks to the dedication and perseverance needed to master a skill or craft.  Well-thought-out plans are needed; stay practical in carrying them out.  This is not a card about waiting for a lucky break; be prepared for hard work!  Your reward will be in seeing the beautiful results of your labor take shape in your hands.
66.meaning_th: ทีมงาน ทักษะ การร่วมมือ คุณภาพ ทำงานร่วมกับผู้อื่นจะให้ผลลัพธ์ที่ดีที่สุดค่ะ ทักษะของคุณได้รับการยอมรับค่ะ

67.name: Four of Pentacles
67.notes:
SECURITY
This card shows different ways of providing for oneself, from a healthy impulse toward survival and self-nurturance to an over-reliance on material things.  The people at the well understand the necessity of taking care of themsleves, yet they know they cannot do it alone.  Honoring the life source that sustains them, they are able to give with generosity and receive with gratitude.

Then we have the miser, clinging jealously to what is hers.  She fails to see her interdependence with the rest of the tribe:  that her own survival and well-being are intimately bound up with others.  Mistrusting, even amid abundance, she hoards her possessions and becomes a slave to them.

The Four of Pentacles reminds us not to depend on what we own for our sense of security.  The pursuit of material gain alone is barren and destructive to both individuals and the larger organism of life.  A culture that has survived for so long in the desert knows that the best insurance is the love and support of community.  If one falls, the others will be there to support them.  This true wealth can't be hoarded.

The card may represent a time when survival instincts are needed.  A genuine danger to your security could be at hand, so clever stewardship of resources is important.  At the same time, don't let irrational fears of deprivation take over.  You are being asked to honestly examine your relationship with money and possessions.  Recognize and appreciate the forces that sustain your life.  Failure to do so brings stagnation and an ironic scarcity of funds.
67.meaning_th: ความมั่นคง การออมทรัพย์ แต่ระวังความตระหนี่ ปล่อยวางบ้าง ดูแลความมั่นคงทางการเงินดีค่ะ แต่อย่าปล่อยให้ความกลัวทำให้ตระหนี่จนเกินค่ะ

68.name: Five of Pentacles
68.notes:
HARDSHIP
Times are hard.  You may be homeless, jobless, or suffering from illness.  Financial stress may be causing terrible anxiety.  It may seem like your troubles have been around for so long that they'll never end.

Misjudging the reliability of others, including institutions of church or state, may have left you out in the cold, grappling with an understandable collapse of faith in society.  Whoever let you down, now is not the time to try to heal rifts in your relationships or to look for outside assistance.  You'll have to draw on your own resources to make it through.
68.meaning_th: ความลำบาก การสูญเสียทางการเงิน ความโดดเดี่ยว แต่ความช่วยเหลืออยู่ใกล้ ช่วงยากแต่ไม่ใช่ตลอดไปค่ะ ขอความช่วยเหลือได้ค่ะ

69.name: Six of Pentacles
69.notes:
CHARITY
The Six of Pentacles show people sharing resources.  Traditionally, this card has presumed the superiority of the giver.  Yet it may be that the rich man, holding his scales, remembers how others have helped him.

If you find yourself in need, expect help in some form with your financial situation:  an inheritance, a grant, a gift, or simply some useful advice.  The human heart holds a profound capacity for generosity.  But be sure to be thrifty and to explore creative ways to meet your needs.  Charity is not to be relied on as a lifestyle.

If you are doing well, share some of your abundance.  And remember, offering to teach someone a new skill can be just as valuable as money.
69.meaning_th: การให้และรับ ความเอื้อเฟื้อ ความสมดุลทางการเงิน บัดนี้คือเวลาแห่งการแบ่งปันค่ะ ความเอื้อเฟื้อจะไหลกลับมาหาคุณค่ะ

70.name: Seven of Pentacles
70.notes:
ASSESSMENT
Long hours have been spent cultivating the ground.  You have poured yourself into a project, and now it can carry itself.  The Seven of Pentacles invites you to pause a moment, ponder the past, and assess the future.

When you finally look up from your work, you may be faced with some hard questions.  Are your efforts bearing fruit as you envisioned?  Is it best to continue to develop this project or to shift your energy and risk losing everything in order to start a new one?  If you're having trouble deciding whether to boldly change directions or to persevere, remember that our lives follow the cycles of nature.  Be patient, and give yourself time to decide the next step.
70.meaning_th: ความอดทน การประเมินผล การลงทุนระยะยาว ยังอีกนาน แต่กำลังเติบโต สิ่งที่ทำอยู่ต้องการเวลาค่ะ อดทนรอค่ะ ผลลัพธ์ที่ดีกำลังค่อยๆ เติบโตค่ะ

71.name: Eight of Pentacles
71.notes:
MASTERY
The Eight of Pentacles signals that you are ready to bring a talent to the next level of mastery.  Your specialty could be painting, playing an instrument, baking bread, building houses, caring for children, or anything that requires knowledge and skill to accomplish it.  You may be ready to turn a favorite hobby into a profession.

To make this shift, long hours of practice will be needed.  An experienced teacher can offer guidance and encouragement.  But you'll also need an almost single-minded focus, along with a healthy dose of self-discipline, to become a master of your trade.
71.meaning_th: ทักษะ ความขยัน การพัฒนาตัวเอง ความสำเร็จจากความพยายาม ฝึกฝนและพัฒนาทักษะต่อไปค่ะ ความขยันอุตสาหะจะให้ผลตอบแทนค่ะ

72.name: Nine of Pentacles
72.notes:
SUCCESS
The Nine of Pentacles congratulates you on your accomplishments.  A successful and productive life is surely something to bask in and injoy.  Within this garden of solitary leisure, we can learn to truly be content with our own company.

Knowing your own worth from an inner place, regardless of how others view your achievements, is priceless.  With a strong sense of your own unique abilities and the knowledge that you can take care of yourself, you will bloom like a well-tended garden.  The ability to love and appreciate oneself is the ultimate success.
72.meaning_th: ความอุดมสมบูรณ์ ความเป็นอิสระ ผลของความพยายาม ความสำเร็จส่วนตัว คุณได้สร้างบางสิ่งที่มีคุณค่าค่ะ เพลิดเพลินกับผลของความพยายามค่ะ

73.name: Ten of Pentacles
73.notes:
LEGACY
In the Ten of Pentacles, we experience the satisfaction of having all our needs met.  Having attained a lasting level of security, we have good reason to relax and to celebrate the abundance of life with friends and family.

At the same time, this card speaks to the importance of creating something worth passing on to future generations.  Whatever your age, start thinking about the legacy you will leave.  What impact will your life have on the world?

On an even deeper level, the Ten of Pentacles offers a gateway into the essence of its suit:  that the everyday world contains magic and mystery that we are often too busy to acknowledge.  Honoring this magic is perhaps the most profound and valuable legacy we can leave behind.
73.meaning_th: ความมั่งคั่ง ความมั่นคงของครอบครัว มรดก ความสำเร็จระยะยาว ความมั่นคงและความสุขในระยะยาวกำลังมาถึงค่ะ

74.name: Page of Pentacles
74.notes:
SEER OF PENTACLES
The Seer of Pentacles is dedicated to comprehending the world around her.  Quiet, receptive, and often alone, she finds solace in the earth and her creatures.  She is learning to hear the earth's wisdom and to trust her instincts.  Trustworthy and reliable, she can be counted on to give her all to a project.  Deliberate in her actions, she moves slowly but surely toward her goals.

The Seer of Pentacles describes a studious person with great focus and determination.  Though you may find her reflected in another, she surely points to aspects of yourself to pay attention to.
74.meaning_th: การเรียนรู้ โอกาสใหม่ ความขยัน การวางแผน เวลาเรียนรู้สิ่งใหม่ค่ะ โอกาสทางการเงินหรืออาชีพกำลังเริ่มต้นค่ะ

75.name: Knight of Pentacles
75.notes:
SEEKER OF PENTACLES
The Seeker of Pentacles is a worker bee.  Above all else he wants security in his life, and he will work slowly and steadily toward it.  Believing that a simple lifestyle is best, he has a meditative, even sacred approach to his work.  He carries out his tasks without complaint and serves others with a glad heart.  Although he manages his time and resources well, he lacks spontaneity and can become stuck in his ways.  Yet since his aims are so humble, he often attains them.

The Seeker's teachings may come to you through a trustworthy and responsible person, or he may symbolize aspects of yourself worth cultivating.
75.meaning_th: ความขยัน ความรับผิดชอบ ความมั่นคง ความอดทน ทำงานอย่างมีระบบและรับผิดชอบค่ะ ความพยายามอย่างสม่ำเสมอจะให้ผลค่ะ

76.name: Queen of Pentacles
76.notes:
SIBYL OF PENTACLES
The Sibyl of Pentacles loves her body, the earth, and life itself.  She moves in deep communion with the world around her, in harmony with nature's rhythms.  She remembers the teachings of her ancestors and understands the cycles of fertility:  that there are times of birth, of growth, and of dying back.  A caretaker, she preserves and protects what is hers, finding pleasure in the tasks of ordinary living.

The Sibyl of Pentacles knows her own magic, and in her self-awareness finds a potent confidence with which to live.  Her life is so rich and full that she can easily be generous.  This Sibyl may be a sensual and grounded person in your life, someone you can turn to for nurturance.  She also calls on you to find some of her earthy qualities in yourself.  When she appears in a reading, self-trust is the most important quality she asks you to cultivate.
76.meaning_th: ความอุดมสมบูรณ์ ความเป็นแม่บ้าน การดูแล ความมั่นคง ดูแลตัวเองและคนที่รักค่ะ ความมั่นคงและความอบอุ่นคือพลังของคุณค่ะ

77.name: King of Pentacles
77.notes:
SAGE OF PENTACLES
The Sage of Pentacles rules with a steady hand and a kind heart.  With years of experience behind him, he stewards both people and resources wisely.  Powerful and successful in the worldly realm, he has no need to prove himself to anyone.  His outer achievements grow out of an inner peace, a satisfaction that stems from a deep appreciation of life.

Steeped in the cycles of nature, the Sage brings patience and practicality to everything he does.  He may appear in your life as a strong and serene person.  He may also be calling on you to find your own stable center.
77.meaning_th: ความมั่งคั่ง ความสำเร็จ ภาวะผู้นำทางธุรกิจ ความมั่นคง คุณมีทุกสิ่งที่ต้องการสร้างความมั่งคั่งค่ะ ใช้ปัญญาและประสบการณ์ขับเคลื่อนค่ะ
